mapper.select: SELECT A01, A02, A03, A04, A05, A06, A07, A08, A09, A10 FROM ( SELECT SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C, 'I', CNT,0)) AS A01 ,SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C, 'T', CNT,0)) AS A02 ,SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C, 'I', 1,0)) AS A03 ,SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C, 'T', 1,0)) AS A04 FROM ( SELECT RSK_B_C, MNG_BRNO, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE USYN = '1' GROUP BY RSK_B_C, MNG_BRNO ) ) AA, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS A05 FROM RBA_PROC_M WHERE USYN = 1) BB, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS A06 FROM RBA_TONGJE_M WHERE USYN = 1) CC, (SELECT SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C, 'I', CNT,0)) AS A07, SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C, 'T', CNT,0)) AS A08 FROM (SELECT RSK_B_C, COUNT(*) CNT FROM RBA_KRI_M WHERE USYN = '1' GROUP BY RSK_B_C )) DD, (SELECT SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C, 'I', CNT,0)) AS A09, SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C, 'T', CNT,0)) AS A10 FROM (SELECT RSK_B_C, COUNT(*) CNT FROM RBA_KCI_M WHERE USYN = '1' GROUP BY RSK_B_C )) EE

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0
AND VALT_G = '1'
AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
) SELECT IRSK_T_CNT AS C01 ,IRSK_VALT_CNT AS C02 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C03 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C04 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C05 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C06 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C07 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C08 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3/(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C09 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999'
AND X.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UNION ALL SELECT 0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선
,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료
FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */
AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7))
AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인
AND B.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
) BB ) CC

SELECT C11, C12, C13, C14, C15, C16, C17, C18, C19, C21, C22, C23, C24, C25, C26, C27, C28, C29 ,C31, C32, C33, C34, C35, C36, C37, C38, C39, C41, C42, C43, C44, C45, C46, C47, C48, C49 ,C51, C52, C53, C54, C55, C56, C57, C58, C59, C61, C62, C63, C64, C65, C66, C67, C68, C69 FROM ( WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT IRSK_T_CNT AS C11 ,IRSK_VALT_CNT AS C12 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C13 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C14 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C15 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C16 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C17 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C18 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3 / (IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C19 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' AND X.RSK_G_C='1' UNION ALL SELECT 0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.RSK_G_C='1' AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 ) BB ) CC)UU, ( WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT IRSK_T_CNT AS C21 ,IRSK_VALT_CNT AS C22 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C23 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C24 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C25 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C26 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C27 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C28 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3 /(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C29 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' AND X.RSK_G_C='2' UNION ALL SELECT 0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.RSK_G_C='2' AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 ) BB ) CC)VV, ( WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT IRSK_T_CNT AS C31 ,IRSK_VALT_CNT AS C32 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C33 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C34 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C35 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C36 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C37 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C38 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3/(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C39 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' AND X.RSK_G_C='3' UNION ALL SELECT 0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.RSK_G_C='3' AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 ) BB ) CC)WW, ( WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT IRSK_T_CNT AS C41 ,IRSK_VALT_CNT AS C42 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C43 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C44 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C45 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C46 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C47 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C48 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3/(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C49 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' AND X.RSK_G_C='4' UNION ALL SELECT 0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.RSK_G_C='4' AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 ) BB ) CC)XX, ( WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT IRSK_T_CNT AS C51 ,IRSK_VALT_CNT AS C52 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C53 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C54 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C55 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C56 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C57 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C58 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3/(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C59 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' AND X.RSK_G_C='5' UNION ALL SELECT 0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.RSK_G_C='5' AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 ) BB ) CC)YY, ( WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT IRSK_T_CNT AS C61 ,IRSK_VALT_CNT AS C62 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C63 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C64 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C65 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C66 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C67 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C68 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3/(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C69 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' AND X.RSK_G_C='7' UNION ALL SELECT 0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND A.RSK_G_C='7' AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 ) BB ) CC)ZZ

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
) SELECT C71 ,C72 ,C73 ,C74 ,C75 ,C76 ,C77 ,C78 ,C79 ,C80 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT TRSK_T_CNT AS C71 ,KRI_CNT AS C72 ,KCI_CNT AS C73 ,IMPRV_BRNO_CNT AS C74 ,IMPRV_KCI_CNT AS C75 ,IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT AS C76 ,T_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C77 ,T_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C78 ,T_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C79 ,DECODE(T_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(T_IMPRV_CNT3/IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C80 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(TRSK_T_CNT) AS TRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(KRI_CNT) AS KRI_CNT ,SUM(KCI_CNT) AS KCI_CNT ,SUM(IMPRV_BRNO_CNT) AS IMPRV_BRNO_CNT ,SUM(IMPRV_KCI_CNT) AS IMPRV_KCI_CNT ,SUM(IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT) AS IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT ,SUM(T_IMPRV_CNT1) AS T_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(T_IMPRV_CNT2) AS T_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(T_IMPRV_CNT3) AS T_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT X.RSK_NO) AS TRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,COUNT(DISTINCT KRI.KRI_NO) AS KRI_CNT --적용KRI수 ,COUNT(DISTINCT KCI.KCI_NO) AS KCI_CNT --적용KCI수 ,0 AS IMPRV_BRNO_CNT --개선영업점수 ,0 AS IMPRV_KCI_CNT --개선KCI수 ,0 AS IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT --개선KCI영업점합계수 ,0 AS T_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획수 ,0 AS T_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동수 ,0 AS T_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료수 FROM RBA_RSK_M X LEFT JOIN RBA_RSK_KRI_MP KRI ON X.RSK_NO = KRI.RSK_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_RSK_KCI_MP KCI ON X.RSK_NO = KCI.RSK_NO WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL
AND X.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UNION ALL SELECT 0 AS TRSK_T_CNT ,0 AS KRI_CNT ,0 AS KCI_CNT ,COUNT(DISTINCT C.MNG_BRNO) AS IMPRV_BRNO_CNT ,COUNT(DISTINCT C.KCI_NO) AS IMPRV_KCI_CNT --개선KCI수 ,COUNT(C.KCI_NO) AS IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT --개선KCI영업점합계수
,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS T_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS T_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS T_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료
FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_KCI_VALT_D C -- 통합위험_KCI_평가상세 ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER AND B.MNG_BRNO = C.MNG_BRNO
AND C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' --개선건만
LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_KCI_IMPRV_V_I D --KCI 개선내역 ON C.RSK_NO = D.RSK_NO AND C.VALT_TRN = D.VALT_TRN AND C.VALT_SER = D.VALT_SER AND C.MNG_BRNO = D.MNG_BRNO , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 통합위험 현재회차에서만 구함. */ AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN AND A.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND A.USYN = '1' AND B.MNG_BRNO != '9999' -- 공통 AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인
AND B.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
) BB ) CC )DD WHERE 1=1
AND C80 <='20%'
AND C80 > '20%' AND C80 <='40%'
AND C80 > '40%' AND C80 <='60%'
AND C80 > '60%' AND C80 <='80%'
AND C80 > '80%' AND C80 <='100%'

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT MNG_BRNO, MNG_BRNO_NM, GET_LOGINID_NAME(MNGR_JKW_NO) AS MNGR_JKW_NO ,CC.IRSK_T_CNT -- 위험수 ,CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT -- 평가위험수 ,DECODE(CC.IRSK_T_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT/CC.IRSK_T_CNT * 100, 2)) AS IRSK_VALT_RT -- 평가율 ,CC.IRSK_H_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_H_CNT/CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS IRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 ,CC.IRSK_IMPRV_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_IMPRV_CNT/CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT -- 개선대상수 FROM ( SELECT BB.MNG_BRNO ,BB.MNGR_JKW_NO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BB.MNG_BRNO, '') AS MNG_BRNO_NM ,SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_H_CNT) AS IRSK_H_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT X.MNG_BRNO ,X.MNGR_JKW_NO ,COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_H_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' GROUP BY X.MNG_BRNO, X.MNGR_JKW_NO UNION ALL SELECT A.MNG_BRNO ,A.MNGR_JKW_NO ,0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 (잔여위험4등급) ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT -- 개선추출 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' GROUP BY A.MNG_BRNO, A.MNGR_JKW_NO ) BB GROUP BY MNG_BRNO, MNGR_JKW_NO ) CC

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT '위험별' AS GUBUN ,RSK_G_C, RSK_G_C_NM ,CC.IRSK_T_CNT -- 위험수 ,CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT -- 평가위험수 ,DECODE(CC.IRSK_T_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT/CC.IRSK_T_CNT * 100, 2)) AS IRSK_VALT_RT -- 평가율 ,CC.IRSK_H_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_H_CNT/CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS IRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 ,CC.IRSK_IMPRV_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_IMPRV_CNT/CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT -- 개선대상수 FROM ( SELECT BB.RSK_G_C ,GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', BB.RSK_G_C) AS RSK_G_C_NM ,SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_H_CNT) AS IRSK_H_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT X.RSK_G_C , COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_H_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' GROUP BY X.RSK_G_C UNION ALL SELECT A.RSK_G_C ,0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 (잔여위험4등급) ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT -- 개선추출 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 GROUP BY A.RSK_G_C ) BB GROUP BY RSK_G_C ORDER BY RSK_G_C ) CC
UNION
---구분별 (영역) ,A.RSK_FLD_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_F', A.RSK_FLD_C) AS RSK_FLD_C_NM (정보보안부분확인필요)
SELECT '구분별' AS GUBUN ,RSK_FLD_C AS RSK_G_C, RSK_FLD_C_NM AS RSK_G_C_NM ,CC.IRSK_T_CNT -- 위험수 ,CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT -- 평가위험수 ,DECODE(CC.IRSK_T_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT/CC.IRSK_T_CNT * 100, 2)) AS IRSK_VALT_RT -- 평가율 ,CC.IRSK_H_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_H_CNT/CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS IRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 ,CC.IRSK_IMPRV_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_IMPRV_CNT/CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT -- 개선대상수 FROM ( SELECT BB.RSK_FLD_C ,DECODE( BB.RSK_FLD_C, '7', GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', BB.RSK_FLD_C), GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_F', BB.RSK_FLD_C)) AS RSK_FLD_C_NM ,SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_H_CNT) AS IRSK_H_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(X.RSK_FLD_C,1,1),'7',SUBSTR(X.RSK_FLD_C,1,1), X.RSK_FLD_C) AS RSK_FLD_C ,COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_H_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' GROUP BY X.RSK_FLD_C UNION ALL SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(A.RSK_FLD_C,1,1),'7', SUBSTR(A.RSK_FLD_C,1,1), A.RSK_FLD_C) AS RSK_FLD_C ,0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 (잔여위험4등급) ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT -- 개선추출 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1'
AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 GROUP BY A.RSK_FLD_C ) BB GROUP BY RSK_FLD_C ORDER BY RSK_FLD_C ) CC
UNION
---구분별 (부문) A.RSK_BUMUN_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_B', A.RSK_BUMUN_C) AS RSK_BUMUN_C_NM (정보보안부분확인필요)
SELECT '부문별' AS GUBUN ,RSK_BUMUN_C AS RSK_G_C, RSK_BUMUN_C_NM AS RSK_G_C_NM ,CC.IRSK_T_CNT -- 위험수 ,CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT -- 평가위험수 ,DECODE(CC.IRSK_T_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT/CC.IRSK_T_CNT * 100, 2)) AS IRSK_VALT_RT -- 평가율 ,CC.IRSK_H_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_H_CNT/CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS IRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 ,CC.IRSK_IMPRV_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.IRSK_IMPRV_CNT/CC.IRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT -- 개선대상수 FROM ( SELECT BB.RSK_BUMUN_C ,DECODE( BB.RSK_BUMUN_C, '7', GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', BB.RSK_BUMUN_C), GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_B', BB.RSK_BUMUN_C)) AS RSK_BUMUN_C_NM ,SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_H_CNT) AS IRSK_H_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(X.RSK_BUMUN_C,1,1),'7',SUBSTR(X.RSK_BUMUN_C,1,1), X.RSK_BUMUN_C) AS RSK_BUMUN_C ,COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_H_CNT ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' GROUP BY X.RSK_BUMUN_C UNION ALL SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(A.RSK_BUMUN_C,1,1),'7',SUBSTR(A.RSK_BUMUN_C,1,1), A.RSK_BUMUN_C) AS RSK_BUMUN_C ,0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 (잔여위험4등급) ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT -- 개선추출 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */ AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7)) AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 GROUP BY A.RSK_BUMUN_C ) BB GROUP BY RSK_BUMUN_C ORDER BY RSK_BUMUN_C ) CC

-- 영역별 WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT '영역별' AS GUBUN,RSK_FLD_C, RSK_FLD_C_NM ,CC.TRSK_T_CTN ,CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT ,DECODE(CC.TRSK_T_CTN, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT/CC.TRSK_T_CTN * 100, 2)) || '% ' AS TRSK_VALT_RT ,CC.TRSK_H_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.TRSK_H_CNT/CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS TRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 FROM ( SELECT BB.RSK_FLD_C ,DECODE( BB.RSK_FLD_C, '7', GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', BB.RSK_FLD_C), GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_F', BB.RSK_FLD_C)) AS RSK_FLD_C_NM ,SUM(TRSK_T_CTN) AS TRSK_T_CTN ,SUM(TRSK_VALT_CNT) AS TRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(TRSK_H_CNT) AS TRSK_H_CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(X.RSK_FLD_C,1,1),'7',SUBSTR(X.RSK_FLD_C,1,1), X.RSK_FLD_C) AS RSK_FLD_C ,COUNT(RSK_NO) AS TRSK_T_CTN --등록위험수 ,0 AS TRSK_VALT_CNT --평가위험수 ,0 AS TRSK_H_CNT --고위험수 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY X.RSK_FLD_C UNION ALL
SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(A.RSK_FLD_C,1,1),'7', SUBSTR(A.RSK_FLD_C,1,1), A.RSK_FLD_C) AS RSK_FLD_C ,0 AS TRSK_T_CTN ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS TRSK_VALT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS TRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 (잔여위험4등급) FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 통합위험 현재회차에서만 구함. */ AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN AND A.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.MNG_BRNO = '9999' -- 공통 AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 GROUP BY A.RSK_FLD_C ) BB GROUP BY RSK_FLD_C ORDER BY RSK_FLD_C ) CC
UNION
SELECT '구분별' AS GUBUN,CC.RSK_G_C AS RSK_FLD_C ,GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', CC.RSK_G_C) AS RSK_FLD_C_NM ,CC.TRSK_T_CTN ,CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT ,DECODE(CC.TRSK_T_CTN, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT/CC.TRSK_T_CTN * 100, 2)) || '% ' AS TRSK_VALT_RT ,CC.TRSK_H_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.TRSK_H_CNT/CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS TRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 FROM ( SELECT BB.RSK_G_C ,GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', BB.RSK_G_C) AS RSK_G_C_NM ,SUM(TRSK_T_CTN) AS TRSK_T_CTN ,SUM(TRSK_VALT_CNT) AS TRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(TRSK_H_CNT) AS TRSK_H_CNT FROM ( SELECT X.RSK_G_C ,COUNT(RSK_NO) AS TRSK_T_CTN --등록위험수 ,0 AS TRSK_VALT_CNT --평가위험수 ,0 AS TRSK_H_CNT --고위험수 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY X.RSK_G_C UNION ALL
SELECT A.RSK_G_C ,0 AS TRSK_T_CTN ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS TRSK_VALT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS TRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 (잔여위험4등급) FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 통합위험 현재회차에서만 구함. */ AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN AND A.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.MNG_BRNO = '9999' -- 공통 AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 GROUP BY A.RSK_G_C ) BB GROUP BY RSK_G_C ORDER BY RSK_G_C ) CC
UNION
SELECT '부문별' AS GUBUN,RSK_BUMUN_C AS RSK_FLD_C, RSK_BUMUN_C_NM AS RSK_FLD_C_NM ,CC.TRSK_T_CTN ,CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT ,DECODE(CC.TRSK_T_CTN, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT/CC.TRSK_T_CTN * 100, 2)) || '% ' AS TRSK_VALT_RT ,CC.TRSK_H_CNT || '(' || DECODE(CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(CC.TRSK_H_CNT/CC.TRSK_VALT_CNT * 100, 2)) || '%) ' AS TRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 FROM ( SELECT BB.RSK_BUMUN_C ,DECODE( BB.RSK_BUMUN_C, '7', GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', BB.RSK_BUMUN_C), GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_F', BB.RSK_BUMUN_C)) AS RSK_BUMUN_C_NM ,SUM(TRSK_T_CTN) AS TRSK_T_CTN ,SUM(TRSK_VALT_CNT) AS TRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(TRSK_H_CNT) AS TRSK_H_CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(X.RSK_BUMUN_C,1,1),'7',SUBSTR(X.RSK_BUMUN_C,1,1), X.RSK_BUMUN_C) AS RSK_BUMUN_C ,COUNT(RSK_NO) AS TRSK_T_CTN --등록위험수 ,0 AS TRSK_VALT_CNT --평가위험수 ,0 AS TRSK_H_CNT --고위험수 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY X.RSK_BUMUN_C UNION ALL
SELECT DECODE(SUBSTR(A.RSK_BUMUN_C,1,1),'7', SUBSTR(A.RSK_BUMUN_C,1,1), A.RSK_BUMUN_C) AS RSK_BUMUN_C ,0 AS TRSK_T_CTN ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS TRSK_VALT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS TRSK_H_CNT -- 고위험수 (잔여위험4등급) FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 통합위험 현재회차에서만 구함. */ AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN AND A.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.MNG_BRNO = '9999' -- 공통 AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 GROUP BY A.RSK_BUMUN_C ) BB GROUP BY RSK_BUMUN_C ORDER BY RSK_BUMUN_C ) CC

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1'
AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
) SELECT MNG_BRNO ,MNG_BRNO_NM ,IRSK_T_CNT ,IRSK_VALT_CNT ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3/(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS I_IMPRV_CNT4 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT BB.MNG_BRNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', BB.MNG_BRNO, '') AS MNG_BRNO_NM ,SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT X.MNG_BRNO ,COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999'
AND X.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY X.MNG_BRNO UNION ALL SELECT A.MNG_BRNO ,0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선
,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료
FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */
AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7))
AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인
AND B.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY A.MNG_BRNO ) BB GROUP BY MNG_BRNO ) CC

-- 전체 WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
) SELECT MNG_BRNO ,MNG_BRNO_NM ,IMPRV_KCI_CNT ,IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT ,T_IMPRV_CNT1 ,T_IMPRV_CNT2 ,T_IMPRV_CNT3 ,T_IMPRV_CNT4 -- 개선완료율
FROM (
SELECT MNG_BRNO ,MNG_BRNO_NM ,IMPRV_KCI_CNT ,IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT ,T_IMPRV_CNT1 ,T_IMPRV_CNT2 ,T_IMPRV_CNT3 ,DECODE(T_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(T_IMPRV_CNT3/IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS T_IMPRV_CNT4 -- 개선완료율
FROM (
SELECT B.MNG_BRNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', B.MNG_BRNO, '') AS MNG_BRNO_NM ,COUNT(DISTINCT C.KCI_NO) AS IMPRV_KCI_CNT --개선KCI수 ,COUNT(C.KCI_NO) AS IMPRV_BRNO_KCI_CNT --개선KCI영업점합계수
,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS T_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS T_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS T_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료
FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_KCI_VALT_D C -- 통합위험_KCI_평가상세 ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER AND B.MNG_BRNO = C.MNG_BRNO
AND C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' --개선건만
AND C.MNG_BRNO != '9999' LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_KCI_IMPRV_V_I D --KCI 개선내역 ON C.RSK_NO = D.RSK_NO AND C.VALT_TRN = D.VALT_TRN AND C.VALT_SER = D.VALT_SER AND C.MNG_BRNO = D.MNG_BRNO , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 통합위험 현재회차에서만 구함. */ AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN AND A.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.MNG_BRNO != '9999' -- 공통 AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인
AND B.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY B.MNG_BRNO )B )C WHERE 1=1
AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 <='20%'
AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 > '20%' AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 <='40%'
AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 > '40%' AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 <='60%'
AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 > '60%' AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 <='80%'
AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 > '80%' AND T_IMPRV_CNT4 <='100%'

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0 AND VALT_G = '1' AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
)
SELECT AA.MNG_BRNO ,FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', AA.MNG_BRNO, '') AS MNG_BRNO_NM , AA.IRSK_T_CNT , NVL(BB.IRSK_VALT_CNT,0) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT , DECODE(AA.IRSK_T_CNT, 0, 0, ROUND(NVL(BB.IRSK_VALT_CNT,0)/AA.IRSK_T_CNT * 100, 2)) AS IRSK_VALT_RT -- 평가율 , NVL(BB.IRSK_TONGJE4_CNT,0) AS IRSK_TONGJE4_CNT , NVL(BB.IRSK_TONGJE3_CNT,0) AS IRSK_TONGJE3_CNT , NVL(BB.IRSK_TONGJE2_CNT,0) AS IRSK_TONGJE2_CNT , NVL(BB.IRSK_TONGJE1_CNT,0) AS IRSK_TONGJE1_CNT , NVL(BB.IRSK_REMDR4_CNT,0) AS IRSK_REMDR4_CNT , NVL(BB.IRSK_REMDR3_CNT,0) AS IRSK_REMDR3_CNT , NVL(BB.IRSK_REMDR2_CNT,0) AS IRSK_REMDR2_CNT , NVL(BB.IRSK_REMDR1_CNT,0) AS IRSK_REMDR1_CNT FROM ( SELECT X.MNG_BRNO ,COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' GROUP BY X.MNG_BRNO ) AA
, ( SELECT A.MNG_BRNO ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.MOFC_TONGJE_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_TONGJE4_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.MOFC_TONGJE_GD, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_TONGJE3_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.MOFC_TONGJE_GD, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_TONGJE2_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.MOFC_TONGJE_GD, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_TONGJE1_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 4, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_REMDR4_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_REMDR3_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_REMDR2_CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.REMDR_RSK_GD, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_REMDR1_CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */
AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7))
AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') GROUP BY A.MNG_BRNO ) BB WHERE AA.MNG_BRNO = BB.MNG_BRNO(+)

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0
AND VALT_G = '1'
AND VALT_SDT <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
) SELECT IRSK_T_CNT AS C01 ,IRSK_VALT_CNT AS C02 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C03 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C04 ,IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C05 ,I_IMPRV_CNT1 AS C06 ,I_IMPRV_CNT2 AS C07 ,I_IMPRV_CNT3 AS C08 ,DECODE(I_IMPRV_CNT3, 0, 0, ROUND(I_IMPRV_CNT3/(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 + IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ) * 100, 2)) || ' %' AS C09 -- 개선완료율
FROM ( SELECT SUM(IRSK_T_CNT) AS IRSK_T_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_VALT_CNT) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT1) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT2) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 ,SUM(I_IMPRV_CNT3) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 FROM ( SELECT COUNT(RSK_NO) AS IRSK_T_CNT --등록위험수 ,0 AS IRSK_VALT_CNT --위험평가건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선건수 ,0 AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT3 --운영개선건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 --개선계획건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 --개선활동건수 ,0 AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 --개선완료 FROM RBA_RSK_M X WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1 AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.MNG_BRNO ! = '9999' UNION ALL SELECT 0 as IRSK_T_CNT ,COUNT(B.RSK_NO) AS IRSK_VALT_CNT -- ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 3, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT1 --통합개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 1, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --설계개선 ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(B.IMPRV_K_C, 2, 1, 0)),0) AS IRSK_IMPRV_CNT2 --운영개선
,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT1 -- 개선계획 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '3' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C < '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT2 -- 개선활동 ,NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C >= '7' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END),0) AS I_IMPRV_CNT3 -- 개선완료
FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */
AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7))
AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인 ) BB ) CC

(SELECT DISTINCT KRI.KRI_NO ,'KRI' AS TYPE ,M.KRI_NM ,S.KRI_V ,GET_CODE_NAME ('R011', M.UNIT_C) AS UNIT_NM
,S.KRI_CALC_HIS ,M.KRI_CTNT
FROM RBA_RSK_M X ,RBA_RSK_KRI_MP KRI ,RBA_KRI_M M ,RBA_IKRI_S S WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1
AND X.RSK_G_C = #{RSK_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.RSK_NO = KRI.RSK_NO AND KRI.KRI_NO = M.KRI_NO AND KRI.KRI_NO = S.KRI_NO(+)
UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT KCI.KCI_NO ,'KCI' AS TYPE ,M.KCI_NM ,S.KCI_V ,GET_CODE_NAME ('R026', M.UNIT_C) AS UNIT_NM1 ,S.KCI_CALC_HIS ,M.KCI_CTNT
FROM RBA_RSK_M X ,RBA_RSK_KCI_MP KCI ,RBA_KCI_M M ,RBA_IKCI_S S WHERE X.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND X.USYN = 1
AND X.RSK_G_C = #{RSK_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND X.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND X.RSK_NO = KCI.RSK_NO AND KCI.KCI_NO = M.KCI_NO AND KCI.KCI_NO = S.KCI_NO(+)) ORDER BY KRI_NO ASC
